name: Stickman Dismounting 2026
description: Get ready for the ultimate ragdoll physics experience with Stickman Ragdoll Wreckfest! Control a stickman as you launch him from various vehicles and contraptions, sending him tumbling, crashing, and flailing through intricately designed levels. The goal? To cause as much spectacular damage and create the most creative dismounts possible! Web Dev https://www.coolcrazygames.com/
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
